# ADJ-System — LLM Access Guide

> Public implementation and preprint for ADJ (Advocatus Diaboli Judgment).
> Epistemic falsification for AI-generated deviations ("Lücke Z").
> Funk!Werk Ai Solutions, 2026

## Core documents (read first)
/docs/ZENODO_PUBLIKATION.md
/docs/BENCHMARK_SUITE_PAPER.md
/benchmarks/results/comparison_report.md
/README.md

## Zenodo (canonical preprint)
https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21205393

## Related public METIS philosophy
https://github.com/Masterq83/metis-philosophy

## Key claim (engineering hypothesis)
Lücke Z requires separated falsification (Advocatus Diaboli + Judgment + Archivar)
with 4-class output (LH / PH / VC / IU) — not peer-reviewed; see limitations in preprint.

## Human evaluation (EPI-HUMAN30)
/benchmarks/human_eval_pack/ANLEITUNG_RATER_DE.md
/benchmarks/human_eval_pack/rater_sheet.csv

## Citation
Funk, M. (2026). ADJ-System v6.1. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.21205393
